TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ti-syang, title = Ti-syang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ti-syang} }

S.FORM: ś≤ĻÁēęśäÄŚ∑ßťĚ©śĖįŤÄÖ:śŹźť¶ô Titian 1487 ~ 1576 Italian u tineng pabaluhay tu nikulitan, Ti-syang Titian 1487 a mihcaan katukuh 1576 a mihcaan Italian, sakay kahemekan nu mikulita ci Wiy-ni-s, I-Ta-li nu naliman misulitay cumelak macakay nu Wi-ni-s. lecuhan i I-ta-li nu Wi-ni-s satipan salungan ku hekal nu buyuay a niyazu', Ka-tu-lay, 12 ku mihcaan hawsa ladaye nu wama ciniza miliwku i Wi-ni-s, zikuz ci Ti-syang muliya tayza tayza i Wi-ni-s kakelul micumud i Bellini a pikulitan a pikawawan minanam mikulit, namahiza sa i kauzipan niza caay tu piliyas tu Wi-ni-s. Áē∂ Bellini ŚíĆ Giorgione . yu, BeIIini atu ci Giorione kakilukilul satu mapatay, ci Ti-syang mipatatungus tu tuyni masakaputay kapulungan a kanatalan tu nu mikulitay. i masakapahay henay a ziday i misulitay tu nu tademawan mizatengay nu mikeliday, micaluk atu plahad tu nu Wi-ni-s kucungay mikulitay, u sikulitay a nikulitan, misanga' tu wawaya atu mitiyung tu sapisulit uyza micuzuh pacumud tayza I baluhay a ngatu, i pikulitan tu nu kiwkay pakatineng tu kacakatan lekad a nilaculan a matelek ku nizatengan. nisanga'an banihiway lipahak ku balucu' atu nikakapah ku nikauzip, nika i 1533 a mihcaan Ca-li lima a lasubu a mihcaan pangangan u kakitaan zikuz, kulit satu "Si-pang-ya mapalekay tu ku kiwkay" atu "Bey-li tusa a lasubu a mihcaan u nilecuhan a wawa ci Tay-ce-tang.Pey-ti-nan piini ci Sen-li a Di'tu" mahalhal pasayza kakitaan a nikulitan. u nikulitan tu tademaw niza taneng patahkal paazih tu lalabu nu balucu' a kitakit nu tademaw, u kizemuay a mihcaan misadimel ku pikulit, icelang tanektek, kulikutitan malikat,caay tu pitantan ku nikulitan, sacacacay ku nipakuli yadah ku nikasumad. i tineng nu pikulit sakay zikuz palahan tu mikulitay nu Ow-cow, tabaki ku nikalilid. u nikawawan ni Ti-syang uyza u singanganay,u kahemekan a kawaw" mahini ku patinaku, nika nalimaan malaheciaytu niza a caay situngus tu waway ciniza, u maadubay a tademaw ciniza, miliyung tu zuma a tademaw atu siaenengay maedap tu nabalucu'an nu uzip. nikauzipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ u saayaway nikulitan ni Ti-syang mutesek ku nikalilid ni La-pey-al atu ci Mi-kay-lang-ci-low, zikuz u nikulitan niza palecad tu cumelakay a nisulitan nalimaan a nisangaan nu mikulitay, mangaleb kahenulan ku piyung tu sikulitaya, sakay nuayaw nu mikulitay mahiniay Lu-pen-s atu Pu-san tabaki ku nikalilid. u nisanga'an niza tabaki ku nizatengan, kapah tabaki, makelec ku nisangaan a bacu, u kulikulitan salungan. ci ti-syang nanu Hungti Paw- low tulu lasubu a mihcaac atu Sen-sen low-ma-ti kow Hungti ca-li lima lasubu a mihcaan matakus tayza i Low-ma atu Hung-tiay a luma' mikulit yadah ku nikulitan tu nu tademaway. nika katenes nikauzip niza angangan itini i Wi-ni-s amauzip, nadah ku nisubelidan tu nikulitan. angangan a nikulitan niza uyza kiwkayay atu kasumamaad a Low-ma a nakamuan nu babalak ku sasulitan, matumes nu saigianan a manamuh mahemek tu nu ka satusil nu uzip nu tademaw. nisubelidan a zaysang ťĀļÁĒĘ nikauzipan nikulitan ni Ti-syang pakala tu 400, ayza nisupedan 300 tu. uzumaay "Tay-an-na aci A-ke-tay-ong" i 2008 a mihcaan i Su-ke-lan nu kanatalay a Mey-su-kowan atu kanatal a Mey-su-kowan i 5000 mang nu Ing-pang a kalisiw a aca a micakayan, mala u satekesay nikulitan nu kitakit. u nikulitan niza isasaay u sumanahay ku ayaw, satu nikulitan tahkal ku sumanahay kim, uyni a kulit pangangan han tu "sumanahay Ti-syang".
S.PHON: *******:** titian **** ~ **** itar~…ĺian u tin…ôŇč pabar~…ĺuńßaj tu nikur~…ĺitan, ti-sjaŇč titian **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan itar~…ĺian, sakaj kańß…ôm…ôkan nu mikur~…ĺita ¶i wij-ni-s, i-ta-r~…ĺi nu nar~…ĺiman misur~…ĺitaj ¶um…ôr~…ĺak ma ¶akaj nu wi-ni-s. r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i i-ta-r~…ĺi nu wi-ni-s satipan sar~…ĺuŇčan ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu bujuaj a nijazu Ē~ °, ka-tu-r~…ĺaj, ** ku mińß ¶aan ńßawsa r~…ĺadaj…ô nu wama ¶iniza mir~…ĺiwku i wi-ni-s, zikuz ¶i ti-sjaŇč mur~…ĺija tajza tajza i wi-ni-s kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ mi ¶umud i b…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺini a pikur~…ĺitan a pikawawan minanam mikur~…ĺit, namańßiza sa i kauzipan niza ¶aaj tu pir~…ĺijas tu wi-ni-s. * b…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺini * giorgion…ô . ju, b…ôiiini atu ¶i giorion…ô kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu mapataj, ¶i ti-sjaŇč mipatatuŇčus tu tujni masakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺan tu nu mikur~…ĺitaj. i masakapańßaj ńß…ônaj a zidaj i misur~…ĺitaj tu nu tad…ômawan mizat…ôŇčaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj, mi ¶ar~…ĺuk atu pr~…ĺańßad tu nu wi-ni-s ku ¶uŇčaj mikur~…ĺitaj, u sikur~…ĺitaj a nikur~…ĺitan, misaŇča Ē~ ° tu wawaja atu mitijuŇč tu sapisur~…ĺit ujza mi ¶uzuńß pa ¶umud tajza i bar~…ĺuńßaj a Ňčatu, i pikur~…ĺitan tu nu kiwkaj pakatin…ôŇč tu ka ¶akatan r~…ĺ…ôkad a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a mat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk ku nizat…ôŇčan. nisaŇča Ē~ °an banińßiwaj r~…ĺipańßak ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° atu nikakapańß ku nikauzip, nika i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a-r~…ĺi r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan paŇčaŇčan u kakitaan zikuz, kur~…ĺit satu "si-paŇč-ja mapar~…ĺ…ôkaj tu ku kiwkaj" atu "b…ô-r~…ĺi tusa a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan u nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan a wawa ¶i taj- ¶…ô-taŇč.p…ô-ti-nan piini ¶i s…ôn-r~…ĺi a di Ē~ °tu" mańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ pasajza kakitaan a nikur~…ĺitan. u nikur~…ĺitan tu tad…ômaw niza tan…ôŇč patańßkar~…ĺ paazińß tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a kitakit nu tad…ômaw, u kiz…ômuaj a mińß ¶aan misadim…ôr~…ĺ ku pikur~…ĺit, i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tan…ôkt…ôk, kur~…ĺikutitan mar~…ĺikat, ¶aaj tu pitantan ku nikur~…ĺitan, sa ¶a ¶a ¶aj ku nipakur~…ĺi jadańß ku nikasumad. i tin…ôŇč nu pikur~…ĺit sakaj zikuz par~…ĺańßan tu mikur~…ĺitaj nu ow- ¶ow, tabaki ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid. u nikawawan ni ti-sjaŇč ujza u siŇčaŇčanaj,u kańß…ôm…ôkan a kawaw" mańßini ku patinaku, nika nar~…ĺimaan mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iajtu niza a ¶aaj situŇčus tu wawaj ¶iniza, u maadubaj a tad…ômaw ¶iniza, mir~…ĺijuŇč tu zuma a tad…ômaw atu sia…ôn…ôŇčaj ma…ôdap tu nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an nu uzip. nikauzipan** u saajawaj nikur~…ĺitan ni ti-sjaŇč mut…ôs…ôk ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid ni r~…ĺa-p…ô-ar~…ĺ atu ¶i mi-kaj-r~…ĺaŇč- ¶i-r~…ĺow, zikuz u nikur~…ĺitan niza par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶um…ôr~…ĺakaj a nisur~…ĺitan nar~…ĺimaan a nisaŇčaan nu mikur~…ĺitaj, maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb kańß…ônur~…ĺan ku pijuŇč tu sikur~…ĺitaja, sakaj nuajaw nu mikur~…ĺitaj mańßiniaj r~…ĺu-p…ôn-s atu pu-san tabaki ku nikar~…ĺir~…ĺid. u nisaŇča Ē~ °an niza tabaki ku nizat…ôŇčan, kapańß tabaki, mak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ku nisaŇčaan a ba ¶u, u kur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan sar~…ĺuŇčan. ¶i ti-sjaŇč nanu ńßuŇčti paw- r~…ĺow tur~…ĺu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aa ¶ atu s…ôn-s…ôn r~…ĺow-ma-ti kow ńßuŇčti ¶a-r~…ĺi r~…ĺima r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan matakus tajza i r~…ĺow-ma atu ńßuŇč-tiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mikur~…ĺit jadańß ku nikur~…ĺitan tu nu tad…ômawaj. nika kat…ôn…ôs nikauzip niza aŇčaŇčan itini i wi-ni-s amauzip, nadańß ku nisub…ôr~…ĺidan tu nikur~…ĺitan. aŇčaŇčan a nikur~…ĺitan niza ujza kiwkajaj atu kasumamaad a r~…ĺow-ma a nakamuan nu babar~…ĺak ku sasur~…ĺitan, matum…ôs nu saigianan a manamuńß mańß…ôm…ôk tu nu ka satusir~…ĺ nu uzip nu tad…ômaw. nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč ** nikauzipan nikur~…ĺitan ni ti-sjaŇč pakar~…ĺa tu ***, ajza nisup…ôdan *** tu. uzumaaj "taj-an-na a ¶i a-k…ô-taj-oŇč" i **** a mińß ¶aan i su-k…ô-r~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺaj a m…ô-su-kowan atu kanatar~…ĺ a m…ô-su-kowan i **** maŇč nu iŇč-paŇč a kar~…ĺisiw a a ¶a a mi ¶akajan, mar~…ĺa u sat…ôk…ôsaj nikur~…ĺitan nu kitakit. u nikur~…ĺitan niza isasaaj u sumanańßaj ku ajaw, satu nikur~…ĺitan tańßkar~…ĺ ku sumanańßaj kim, ujni a kur~…ĺit paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "sumanańßaj ti-sjaŇč".
S.FORM: ś≤ĻÁēęśäÄŚ∑ßťĚ©śĖįŤÄÖ:śŹźť¶ô Titian 1487 ~ 1576 Italian u tineng pabaluhay tu nikulitan, Ti-syang Titian 1487 a mihcaan katukuh 1576 a mihcaan Italian, sakay kahemekan nu mikulita ci Wiy-ni-s, I-Ta-li nu naliman misulitay cumelak macakay nu Wi-ni-s. lecuhan i I-ta-li nu Wi-ni-s satipan salungan ku hekal nu buyuay a niyazu', Ka-tu-lay, 12 ku mihcaan hawsa ladaye nu wama ciniza miliwku i Wi-ni-s, zikuz ci Ti-syang muliya tayza tayza i Wi-ni-s kakelul micumud i Bellini a pikulitan a pikawawan minanam mikulit, namahiza sa i kauzipan niza caay tu piliyas tu Wi-ni-s. Áē∂ Bellini ŚíĆ Giorgione . yu, BeIIini atu ci Giorione kakilukilul satu mapatay, ci Ti-syang mipatatungus tu tuyni masakaputay kapulungan a kanatalan tu nu mikulitay. i masakapahay henay a ziday i misulitay tu nu tademawan mizatengay nu mikeliday, micaluk atu plahad tu nu Wi-ni-s kucungay mikulitay, u sikulitay a nikulitan, misanga' tu wawaya atu mitiyung tu sapisulit uyza micuzuh pacumud tayza I baluhay a ngatu, i pikulitan tu nu kiwkay pakatineng tu kacakatan lekad a nilaculan a matelek ku nizatengan. nisanga'an banihiway lipahak ku balucu' atu nikakapah ku nikauzip, nika i 1533 a mihcaan Ca-li lima a lasubu a mihcaan pangangan u kakitaan zikuz, kulit satu "Si-pang-ya mapalekay tu ku kiwkay" atu "Bey-li tusa a lasubu a mihcaan u nilecuhan a wawa ci Tay-ce-tang.Pey-ti-nan piini ci Sen-li a Di'tu" mahalhal pasayza kakitaan a nikulitan. u nikulitan tu tademaw niza taneng patahkal paazih tu lalabu nu balucu' a kitakit nu tademaw, u kizemuay a mihcaan misadimel ku pikulit, icelang tanektek, kulikutitan malikat,caay tu pitantan ku nikulitan, sacacacay ku nipakuli yadah ku nikasumad. i tineng nu pikulit sakay zikuz palahan tu mikulitay nu Ow-cow, tabaki ku nikalilid. u nikawawan ni Ti-syang uyza u singanganay,u kahemekan a kawaw" mahini ku patinaku, nika nalimaan malaheciaytu niza a caay situngus tu waway ciniza, u maadubay a tademaw ciniza, miliyung tu zuma a tademaw atu siaenengay maedap tu nabalucu'an nu uzip. nikauzipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ u saayaway nikulitan ni Ti-syang mutesek ku nikalilid ni La-pey-al atu ci Mi-kay-lang-ci-low, zikuz u nikulitan niza palecad tu cumelakay a nisulitan nalimaan a nisangaan nu mikulitay, mangaleb kahenulan ku piyung tu sikulitaya, sakay nuayaw nu mikulitay mahiniay Lu-pen-s atu Pu-san tabaki ku nikalilid. u nisanga'an niza tabaki ku nizatengan, kapah tabaki, makelec ku nisangaan a bacu, u kulikulitan salungan. ci ti-syang nanu Hungti Paw- low tulu lasubu a mihcaac atu Sen-sen low-ma-ti kow Hungti ca-li lima lasubu a mihcaan matakus tayza i Low-ma atu Hung-tiay a luma' mikulit yadah ku nikulitan tu nu tademaway. nika katenes nikauzip niza angangan itini i Wi-ni-s amauzip, nadah ku nisubelidan tu nikulitan. angangan a nikulitan niza uyza kiwkayay atu kasumamaad a Low-ma a nakamuan nu babalak ku sasulitan, matumes nu saigianan a manamuh mahemek tu nu ka satusil nu uzip nu tademaw. nisubelidan a zaysang ťĀļÁĒĘ nikauzipan nikulitan ni Ti-syang pakala tu 400, ayza nisupedan 300 tu. uzumaay "Tay-an-na aci A-ke-tay-ong" i 2008 a mihcaan i Su-ke-lan nu kanatalay a Mey-su-kowan atu kanatal a Mey-su-kowan i 5000 mang nu Ing-pang a kalisiw a aca a micakayan, mala u satekesay nikulitan nu kitakit. u nikulitan niza isasaay u sumanahay ku ayaw, satu nikulitan tahkal ku sumanahay kim, uyni a kulit pangangan han tu "sumanahay Ti-syang".

nikauzip niza aŇčaŇčan itini i wi-ni-s amauzip, nadańß ku nisub…ôr~…ĺidan tu nikur~…ĺitan. aŇčaŇčan a nikur~…ĺitan niza ujza kiwkajaj atu kasumamaad a r~…ĺow-ma a nakamuan nu babar~…ĺak ku sasur~…ĺitan, matum…ôs nu saigianan a manamuńß mańß…ôm…ôk tu nu ka satusir~…ĺ nu uzip nu tad…ômaw. nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč ** nikauzipan nikur~…ĺitan ni ti-sjaŇč pakar~…ĺa tu ***, ajza nisup…ôdan *** tu. uzumaaj "taj-an-na a ¶i a-k…ô-taj-oŇč" i **** a mińß ¶aan i su-k…ô-r~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺaj a m…ô-su-kowan atu kanatar~…ĺ a m…ô-su-kowan i **** maŇč nu iŇč-paŇč a kar~…ĺisiw a a ¶a a mi ¶akajan, mar~…ĺa u sat…ôk…ôsaj nikur~…ĺitan nu kitakit. u nikur~…ĺitan niza isasaaj u sumanańßaj ku ajaw, satu nikur~…ĺitan tańßkar~…ĺ ku sumanańßaj kim, ujni a kur~…ĺit paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "sumanańßaj ti-sjaŇč".
